summary: Tested Authority Window Clock widget in OperatorQualifierSection. All 10 test scenarios passed: DOM structure, date input placement, placeholder text, all 4 window states (EARLY/ACTIVE/CLOSING/THRESHOLD), NOT FOR YOU card integrity, reach-diagnostic-link.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Authority Window Clock fully functional. data-testid='authority-date-input' inside FOR YOU card. data-testid='window-status-display' appears after date entry. States verified: EARLY WINDOW (day 20, gold), ACTIVE WINDOW (day 45, gold), CLOSING WINDOW (day 80, orange, shows remaining days), THRESHOLD REACHED (day 100, red, Month 3 message). NOT FOR YOU card unchanged (4 ✗ items). reach-diagnostic-link present with href=/reach-diagnostic.

test_results.early_window_20_days: PASS - Day 20, EARLY WINDOW badge, gold color
test_results.active_window_45_days: PASS - Day 45, ACTIVE WINDOW badge, gold color
test_results.closing_window_80_days: PASS - Day 80, CLOSING WINDOW badge, orange, '10 days remaining'
